add_namespace = submod_test

country_event = {
	id = submod_test.1
	title = submod_test.1.t
	desc = submod_test.1.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_generic

	is_triggered_only = yes

	trigger = {
		tag = SOV
		has_idea = md_test_idea
	}

	option = {
		name = submod_test.1.o1
		add_political_power = 75
		add_stability = 0.03
		add_opinion_modifier = { target = CHI modifier = improve_relation }
		country_event = { id = submod_test.2 days = 7 }
	}
}

country_event = {
	id = submod_test.2
	title = submod_test.2.t
	desc = submod_test.2.d
	picture = GFX_report_event_generic

	is_triggered_only = yes

	option = {
		name = submod_test.2.o1
		add_stability = 0.05
	}
}
